✦ a little about me

At the edge of data & code

I'm in my third year of BSc Computer Science at Indraprastha College for Women. The subjects that actually stuck with me are the ones sitting at the crossroads of maths, systems, and real problems — Statistics, Machine Learning, Cloud Computing, Networks, AI.

Data work forces you to think clearly. Software development forces you to think precisely. I like having both pushing on each other.

Outside coursework, I work with Power BI for visualisation, Python for analysis and scripting, and Canva for all things design. I've picked up certifications from Google Cloud, University of Maryland, and a few others along the way.

I'm actively looking for internships in data analytics or software development. Let's talk →

✦ selected work

Things I've made

A mix of design work, data projects, and software in progress. Updated as things get built and shipped — so check back.

₹
live project ↗
Full-stack · ML · Python · React
SpendSmart — AI Expense Tracker

Log daily expenses and let KMeans clustering surface patterns in your spending. The ML model groups transactions by category, amount, and day-of-week — then explains what it found in plain language.

"Your top category is Housing (86.2%). You spend 3.6× more on Food on weekends than weekdays."
Flask SQLAlchemy JWT Auth scikit-learn KMeans React + Vite Chart.js
